offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We send weekly reminder reports instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders.
problem: Overdue customer invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Join community forums for Etsy sellers' tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of overdue invoices and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing invoice data
One-click export of a simple report
